content: Ultimate Vault Hunter Upgrade Pack Two: Digistruct Peak Challenge
name: Legendary Sickle
description: Legendary Bandit class mod for Krieg the Psycho, part of the Digistruct Peak content. Built around Taste of Blood, Fuel the Blood, Empty the Rage, Silence the Voices, Pain is Power. Focused on melee damage and melee override cooldowns.
notes: Requires the Digistruct Peak Challenge DLC. Below-level-50 versions cannot be obtained legitimately. Although it is the legendary Sickle, it uses the Meat class mod model. The red flavour line quotes Walter Sobchak from The Big Lebowski.

special.description: At max level: +61% melee damage. Also improves melee override cooldown rate.
special.title: You're entering a world of pain.
